# Sprint 0.1 Environment Setup

**Sprint:** Sprint 0. Platform Foundation
**Objective:** Establish the foundation for the analytics platform, including Snowflake setup and initial data ingestion.

## Description
Set up the Snowflake environment, including account creation, user management, and initial configuration. Define the overall architecture and high-level design for the platform.

## Deliverable
Snowflake environment setup and initial configuration
